name: Kuriyagawa

name: Sushi Marufuku

name: Shinjuku Kappo NAKAJIMA

name: Ginza GOMEI

name: ÉdiTioN Koji Shimomura

name: Kappo TAJIMA

name: GINZA Kansei

name: Kappo KISAKU

name: Suikoan

name: O2

name: La Paix
description_en: A world gourmet guide award modern French restaurant with Japanese spirit of harmony 'Wa'.

name: Washoku ONODERA

name: Bistro Simba
description_en: A bistro where you can enjoy the aroma and warmth

name: Ranmaru
description_en: A sister-restaurant of “Sushi Rinda”, this is an Edomae-style sushi restaurant where you can enjoy cuisine crafted by young chefs

name: Hiroyuki

name: Kagami

name: Sazenka
description_en: Chinese cuisine unique to Japan, a Chef having remarkable experience

name: Nihonbashi Sonoji

name: OGGI DAL-MATTO Nishi-Azabu Branch
description_en: Casual Italian perfect to adults, normally can be reserved on the day only

name: Sushi Matsuura
description_en: In Shirokane, sushi prepared with original blend of vinegared rice, by the owner-chef who made the rounds of renowned sushi restaurants

name: Shinbashi Sasada
description_en: Enjoy simple yet masterful world gourmet guide awarded traditional Japanese cuisine made by the skilled owner chef

name: kafuka tokyo
description_en: A global Japanese restaurant, generating a circle of dining with Japanese cuisine and sake

name: Ginza Tozaki
description_en: Enjoy a relaxing meal at the counter; Imaginative sushi and Japanese cuisine 'Tozaki'

name: THE LOUNGE
description_en: Enjoy afternoon tea with a view and sweet treats

name: Chinese bed
description_en: A fusion of Cantonese and Sichuan cuisine created with the heart of medicinal dishes in Shibuya

name: Sushi ICHIKAWA
description_en: A new world in Shirokane Takanawa - Combines Tokyo-style Sushi and Kyoto cuisine

name: Kyoto Cuisine Aun
description_en: Seasonal ingredients and “dashi” (soup stock) with the highest quality, a counter-style kappo restaurant in Tomigaya

name: Kawasaki
description_en: Enjoy a symphony of Japanese cuisine, made using the very finest ingredients, in a luxury space containing just 2 private rooms.

name: Shunkoutei
description_en: Experience aged beef and gastrovac cuisine at this Western-style restaurant cum winery

name: Akasaka Ogino
description_en: Skilled in the art of traditional Japanese kaiseki, a talented chef with three-star pedigree serves his guests at an exclusive 7-seat counter in Akasaka

name: Ginza Yamanobe  Edo-Chuka
description_en: A new genre of food known as Edo-Chinese cuisine, offering Chinese dishes prepared with Japanese seasonal ingredients.

name: Principio
description_en: The delicate flavor outshines the simplicity in the meat.

name: Comptoir Missago
description_en: A comfortable French restaurant serving wild game and "unpretentious good food".

name: DEN
description_en: Enjoy the cuisine and hospitality of "Hasegawa-style", which is attracting worldwide attention

name: Shirokanetei Ishinabe Noguchi

name: Aoyama Hashizume
description_en: Refined Neo Chinese cuisine with Chinese elements mixed with Japanese elements

name: OHARA ET CIE
description_en: A spacious French restaurant with exquisite cuisine that has earned a world gourmet guide award

name: Saucer
description_en: Enjoy exquisite French dishes, all made with triple consommé, at a French restaurant in Ebisu that takes pride in its sauces

name: Sushi Ikki
description_en: A sushi restaurant in Shibuya renowned for the combination of skillfully crafted Japanese cuisine and Edomae sushi

name: Zakuro TBS
description_en: Zakuro TBS opened as a branch of a 1955-established shabu-shabu restaurant to offer premium Kuroge Wagyu beef and exquisite Japanese cuisine

name: Namaiki
description_en: A sister restaurant of the legendary Yoroniku, offering the ultimate melt-in-the-mouth meat in Suehiro-cho

name: Sushiya Shota
description_en: A sushi restaurant that brings the signature sushi and sake of the two-star Sushi Kanesaka to Azabu-juban

name: Akasaka Misuji
description_en: A sister site of the legendary Yoroniku, this yakiniku restaurant serves premium lean meat à la carte, with a focus on the top blade cut

name: Ryotei Kiyoshi
description_en: You could come in contact with the deep culture of 'Ryotei' (a traditional Japanese high-class restaurant) through Japanese culture with food, clothing, and shelter.
